title: Schema Migration Playbook (HabitsTracker)
summary: A playbook for safely changing SwiftData @Model types in HabitsTracker without crashing existing users, encoding hard migration constraints.
notes: MANIFEST_TYPE=DOC applied as authoritative. Content also carries strong constraint signals (plan-less ModelContainer, optional/defaulted fields, @Attribute(originalName:) renames, mandatory upgrade test, never mutate frozen schema) that the synthesizer should extract as technical constraints despite the DOC classification.
